text.p: I wish to write to congratulate you on your well deserved victory at the polls during the recent - local government elections.

I wish you a fruitful and purposeful tenue of office during which you shall lay a solid foundation for the rapid development of our young local government area. I wish to use this opportunity to let you know that once more that the people of town are solidly behind your people ouiented progrommes -

My letter to you will not be complete if I did not remind you about the poor state of roads in town which you promised during your compaigns to far them immediately you assume office. You are aware that is the faremost agricultural community in this local government area. Inview of that, the town which is the food basket of the local - government desrves a good net-work roads to ensure easy tran-sportation of farm produre to the cities at a affordable rate. this can be realized by the - construction of roads and repairs of existy onces in town.
once more kindly accept my congratulations.
